title: Intel India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Intel India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Intel India Digital Technologies in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Intel India Digital Technologies:
Intel India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India Digital Technologies!
